subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath sent down the verses and manifested the clear tokens, Who hath spoken the Supreme Word and caused it to be uttered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات و نطق بالکلمه العلیا و انطق بها
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @personal instructions
